name: Gongsun He (公孙贺)
father: Hunye (浑邪), Marquis of Pingqu under Emperor Jing, lost title
positions: Seven times general against Xiongnu, Prime Minister
fate: Executed due to son Jing Sheng's affair with Yangshi Princess and witchcraft case, clan exterminated

name: Li Xi (李息)
campaigns: Three times as general, no major achievements

name: Gongsun Ao (公孙敖)
campaigns: Four times as general against Xiongnu
fate: Executed due to wife's witchcraft case, clan exterminated

name: Zhang Cigong (张次公)
father: Zhang Long, skilled archer favored by Emperor Jing
title: Antou Hou

name: Su Jian (苏建)
title: Pingling Hou
fate: Lost army, redeemed to commoner, later Governor of Dai Commandery

name: Zhao Xin (赵信)
title: Xi Hou (翕侯)
fate: Defected back to Xiongnu after defeat

name: Zhang Qian (张骞)
achievement: Mission to Daxia, guided army knowing water and grass locations
title: Bowang Hou
fate: Lost title for missing deadline, later Dahong, died

name: Han Shuo (韩说)
fate: Killed by Crown Prince Wei while investigating witchcraft case

name: Xun Zhi (荀彘)
fate: Executed for arresting Tower Ship General

name: Zhao Ponu (赵破奴)
fate: Captured by Xiongnu, returned after 10 years, executed for witchcraft case, clan exterminated
